Phishing Email Simulator

Practice spotting suspicious messages in a safe environment.

From: Subject:

Phishing Detection Tips


  • Verify sender addresses carefully.
  • Look for urgent or threatening language.
  • Hover over links before clicking.
  • Never share passwords or personal details by email.

Why This Matters

Phishing remains one of the most common ways attackers gain access to sensitive accounts and systems. Practicing with realistic examples helps build safer habits.
